title: arenaria holostea var. pubescens
intro: Arenaria holostea var. pubescens, also known as the woolly sandwort, is a variety of flowering plant in the carnation family that is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The woolly sandwort has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used to make infusions and salves.
